steps.title: Use plural possession
steps.content: The phrase each of five requires the plural noun variables. Since the variables characterize the movement of objects in general, objects also needs the plural possessive form before movement.

steps.title: Reject apostrophe errors
steps.content: Choice A uses variable's, a singular possessive rather than the plural variables. Choice C uses object's, incorrectly making only one object possess movement. Choice D omits the possessive apostrophe needed before movement. The answer is B.
